display_text: Pirate Hat. Tier N/A: Non-purchasable cursed item providing passive gold steal from enemy deaths and reduces gold loss on death. Plunder: Steals 150 gold when an enemy hero dies within 2400 units (400 extra gold if the wearer scores the kill). Buried Treasure: Reduces gold lost on death by 100%. A powerful economic swing tool.
